title: Moosend vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs AWeber: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and AWeber comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while AWeber targets bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while AWeber is stronger for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or AWeber?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $15/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching from AWeber to Moosend is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
